_description: Gold-standard fixture format for Phase 4c confidence recomputation eval set.
_status: scaffold — no human-reviewed rows yet; awaiting lawyer eval set (ANALYSIS-1)

_v3_weights._note: analyst weight is gated on human-reviewer labels; scaffold uses analyst_score=null

_field_descriptions.law_id: Source law identifier from fact_laws.csv (e.g. CO-SB205)
_field_descriptions.passage_hash: SHA-256 prefix of the passage text used for extraction
_field_descriptions.agent_name: Agent that produced this extraction (e.g. obligation, enforcement_agent)
_field_descriptions.extraction_id: DB extractions.id if available, else null
_field_descriptions.orrick_similarity_score: Raw Orrick combined_score from OrrickSimilarityResult [0.0-1.0], null if no Orrick data
_field_descriptions.iapp_alignment_score: IAPP alignment score mapped via _IAPP_STATUS_TO_SCORE [0.0-1.0], null if no IAPP data
_field_descriptions.evidence_grounding_score: Fraction of extraction fields grounded by verified evidence spans [0.0-1.0]
_field_descriptions.cross_validation_score: Score from CrossValidationAgent [0.0-1.0], null if not run
_field_descriptions.gap_score: 1.0 minus gap_fraction from GapDetector [0.0-1.0], null if not run
_field_descriptions.analyst_score: Human reviewer quality score [0.0-1.0], null until eval set is labeled (ANALYSIS-1)
_field_descriptions.gold_tier: Human-assigned tier label: A, B, C, or D
_field_descriptions.gold_notes: Reviewer notes on why this tier was assigned
_field_descriptions.v3_predicted_tier: Tier predicted by v3 weight formula (computed by recompute_confidence.py)

fixtures._comment: PLACEHOLDER — replace with real labeled extractions after lawyer review
fixtures.gold_notes: PLACEHOLDER: all inputs strong, expected Tier A under v3 weights

fixtures._comment: PLACEHOLDER — IAPP-only path (no Orrick data); expect Tier C cap
fixtures.gold_notes: PLACEHOLDER: no Orrick data; IAPP only; expect below Tier B
